resources.string:
Uma kuvulwe i-TalkBack, inikeza impendulo ekhulunyiwe ukuze usebenzise idivayisi yakho ngaphandle kokubheka isikrini. Lokhu kungaba usizo kubantu abangaboni noma ababona kancane.

Ukuze uzulazule usebenzisa i-TalkBack:
• Swayiphela kwesokudla noma kwesokunxele ukuze uhambe phakathi kwezinto
• Thepha kabili ukuze wenze kusebenze into
• Hudula iminwe emibili ukuze uskrole

Ukuze uvale i-TalkBack:
• Thepha iswishi. Uzobona okuveziwe. Thepha kabili iswishi.
• Kumlayezo wokuqinisekisa, thepha okuthi KULUNGILE. Bese uthepha kabili okuthi KULUNGILE.

Uma i-TalkBack ivuliwe, inikeza impendulo ekhulunywayo ukuze usebenzise idivayisi yakho ngaphandle kokubheka isikrini. I-TalkBack ihloselwe izimo noma abantu abanobunzima bokubona isikrini.

Ungayisebenzisa kanjani i-TalkBack
• Swayipha ngakwesokudla noma kwesobunxele ukuze uhambe phakathi kwezinto
• Thepha kabili ukuze usebenzise into
• Hudula iminwe emibili ukuze uskrole
Ungayivala kanjani i-TalkBack
1. KumaSethingi, thepha okuthi Sebenzisa i-TalkBack. Kuzoba nohlaka. Thepha kabili kulo.
2. Kumyalezo wokuqinisekisa, thepha okuthi Misa.Kuzoba khona uhlaka. Thepha kabili kulo.
Sebenzisa isifundi sesikrini ukuzwa izinto ezikhulunywa ngokuzwakalayo

Okwamanje awekho amalebula angokwezifiso

Uyidala kanjani ilebula yangokwezifiso
Zulazulela esithombeni esingalebuliwe futhi ufake ilebula ukusuka kumenyu ye-TalkBack
Khuluma izaziso uma ngabe isikrini sivaliwe
Njalo nje khuluma inani lohlu lwezinto
Isibalo sokukhuluma sazo zonke izindlela zokuskrola
Uma ukhetha okhiye bekhibhodi noma uzulazula ngohlamvu, uzozwa isibonelo esihambisana nohlamvu ngalunye, njengokuthi \"h, ihhotela\"
Imemezela isibalo sezimpawu eziphindiwe lapho kukhona ezi-4 noma ngaphezulu
Ngemva kokuchaza okuqukethwe, phakamisa indlela yokusebenzisa
Ifaka ulwazi uma ungena noma futhi uphuma kuhlu, kumagridi, nezinye iziqukathi
Swayipha ngeminwe emi-3 ukuze usebenzise isilawuli esifundayo futhi ushintshe ukubambezeleka kokugxilisa, nganoma yisiphi isikhathi

Uma ukubambezeleka kokugxila ekuthayipheni kusethwe kwaba ngaphansi kwemizuzwana engu-0.3, ukuthepha kabili ukuze uthayiphe kuzoba nzima kakhulu. Khetha elithi "Shintsha" ukuze ngokuzenzekelayo ushintshele ekuphakamiseni ukuze uthayiphe.

Ukuze uphakamise khona uzothayipha, umunwe wakho mawucindezele inkinobho ofuna ukuyikhetha, bese uyawuphakamisa ukuze uthayiphe.

Lokhu ungakwenza kuvumelana nomuntu siqu kumasethingi eTalkBack.
Uma unezinkinga zokuthepha kabili ngesikhathi uthayipha, swayipha ngeminwe emi-3 ukuze usebenzise isilawuli esifundayo futhi ushintshele ekubambezelekeni kokuthayipha okude
Ukubambezeleka kokugxila ekuthayipheni akusebenzi ngephandle Kokuphakamisa ukuze uthayiphe.
Lokhu kuzosetha kabusha onke amasethingi okubambezeleka abe azenzakalelayo
Lokhu kuzosetha kabusha konke ukuthintwa kubuyele kulokho obekwenzeka ngokuzenzakalela kwasekuqaleni.\n\nUzolahlekelwa yinoma yiziphi izinguquko osuzenzile.
Kufaka phakathi izibuyekezo ngenkathi ulayisha, udawuniloda, ulandela izikhombisi-ndlela zokushayela, nokuningi. Uma kuvaliwe, usazothola izibuyekezo ezivamile.
Khuluma isistimu futhi ufake amawindi, njengokuthi uma ushintshela kwibha yezaziso, izaziso, noma enye ikhibhodi
Lawa masethingi anganciphisa ukubambezeleka ngaphambi kwezaziso zeTalkBack
Thepha kanye entweni okugxilwe kuyo ukuze wenze kusebenze. Ukufuna okusheshayo kunokuthepha kabili.
Ukuze usebenzise imenyu ye-TalkBack, thepha isikrini ngeminwe emi-3. Ungase futhi uswayiphe phezulu bese ngakwesokudla, noma swayipha phansi bese ngakwesokudla.
Ukuze usebenzise imenyu yeTalkBack, phendula intende yakho yesibili bese uncinza.
Ukuze usebenzise imenyu ye-TalkBack, swayiphela phansi bese ngakwesokudla.
Ukuze usebenzise izilawuli zokufunda, swayiphela ngakwesokunxele noma ngakwesokudla ngeminwe emi-3. Futhi ungaswayiphela phezulu noma phansi ngeminwe emi-3.
Ukuze ujikeleze phakathi kwezilawuli ezifundayo, phendulela intende yakho yesibili ngaphakathi, uncinze ungadedeli, uyise kwesokudla noma kwesobunxele bese udedela.
Ukuze usebenzise izilawuli zokufunda, swayiphela phezulu bese naphansi.
Thola usizo usebenzisa i-TalkBack noma ubike izinkinga
Umlayezo ubonisa uma iTalkBack ivuliwe, ukukusiza ukuyivala ngokushesha
ITalkBack ivuliwe. Beka iminwe emi-2 esikrinini imizuzwana emi-5 ukuze uvale. Ukuze uyeke ukubonisa lo myalezo, thepha ngeminwe emi-3 ukuze uvule imenyu yeTalkBack.
Ibonisa isibhengezo kubonisa ukuthi iTalkBack ivuliwe. Ukuze uvale iTalkBack, bamba iminwe emi-2 esikrinini imizuzwana emi-5. Ukuze ususe lesi sibhengezo, iya Kumasethingi eTalkBack.

Ukuze uqhubeke nokusebenzisa izinqamuleli zekhibhodi, iya kumaSethingi bese ushintsha okusuka kumephu esemqoka engasoze yabuna uye kumephu eyinhloko ezenzakalelayo.

Yini ehlukile ngemephu esemqoka ezenzakalelayo?

  • Kunokokufuna okwengeziwe kanye nezinyathelo zokufuna kuwebhu.
  • Abanye okhiye bokushintsha bahlukile.
I-TalkBack iyakulungela ukususa imephu esemqoka engasoze yabuna. Ukuze uqhubeke nokusebenzisa izinqamuleli zekhibhodi, shintshela kumephu esemqoka ezenzakalelayo.
Ususebenzisa iTalkBack default keymap. Kukhona nemephu esemqoka entsha ethuthukisiwe yemiyalo emisha. Funda kabanzi esikhungweni sosizo noma ushintshele kumephu esemqoka entsha Kumasethingi.
Imephu esemqoka entsha ethuthukise eneTalkBack inemiyalelo eminingi emisha. Funda kabanzi esikhungweni sosizo noma ushintshele kumephu esemqoka entsha Kumasethingi.
Ulwazi olwengeziwe mayelana nokhiye wakho wokushintsha

Ukuze izinqamuleli zekhibhodi yeTalkBack zisebenze kahle, buyekeza ukhiye wakho wokushintsha usuke kwelithi Isenzo uye kwelithi Alt.\n\nUma uqhubeka nokusebenzisa ukhiye wokushintsha okuthi Isenzo, ezinye izinqamuleli zizokwenza okwehlukile kulolu hlobo lwe-Android.
ITalkBack okwamanje isebenzisa i-%1$s njengokhiye wokushintsha.
Funa ewindini elilandelayo noma esakhini sesistimu
Funa ewindini langaphambilini noma esakhini sesistimu
Cindezela i-Backspace ukuze usule isinqamuleli, cindezela ku-Enter ukuze ulondoloze, noma cindezela ku-Escape ukuze ukhansele.
Akunambhalo wokukopishwa, khetha umbhalo othile kuqala.
Akunambhalo wokunamathiselwa, khetha umbhalo othile kuqala.
Akunambhalo ozosikwa, khetha umbhalo othile kuqala.
Akunambhalo ozosulwa, khetha umbhalo othile kuqala.
Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ungathanda ukusetha kabusha okhiye bakho besinqamuleli balo khiye wemephu ubabuyisele kumanani abo okuzenzakalela? Sicela wazi, lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
Cindezela ukuhlanganiswa kokhiye ukuze usethe isinqamuleli esisha. Kumele kuqukathe okungenani ukhiye ongu-ALT noma ongu-Control.
Cindezela ukuhlanganiswa kokhiye ngokhiye wokushintsha ongu-%1$s ukuze kusethwe isinqamuleli esisha.
Ayikwazi ukusebenzisa lesi sinqamuleli. Zama inhlanganisela ehlukile yezinkinobho.

Ukuze usethe isinqamuleli esisha, cindezela inkinobho ethi %1$s +. Kudingeka uchofoze nenkinobho ethi %1$s + control noma shift +. Uma uchofoza okuthi %1$s + O noma R, kudingeka uchofoze inkinobho yesithathu ngokushesha ngemva kwalokho. Chofoza i-Backspace ukuze ususe isinqamuleli, cindezela okuthi Ctrl + Backspace ukuze usethe kabusha ngokuzenzakalelayo. Cindezela okuthi Enter ukuze ulondoloze, noma ucindezele okuthi Escape ukuze ukhansele.
Uma usebenzisa okuthi %1$s + O noma R, kudingeka uchofoze inkinobho yesithathu
Uma usebenzisa okuthi %1$s + O noma R, udinga ukucindezela inkinobho yesithathu. Inkinobho yesithathu akufanele ithi Esc, Backspace, Enter, noma inkinobho yokushintsha.
Lokhu kuhlanganiswa kokhiye kusetshenziselwa isenzo se-\'%1$s\'. Ingabe ufuna ukuwusula uphinde unikeze lesi sinqamuleli ku-\'%2$s\'?
Amasethingi okunciphisa ukubambezeleka ngaphambi kwezimemezelo zeTalkBack
Khuluma izinhlamvu ezisuliwe ngezwi lokuphakama okuphezulu

Ungakwazi ukulungisa ngokushesha amanye amasethingi omsindo weTalkBack kunoma yisiphi isikrini.

Ivolumu yokufinyeleleka: Beka umunwe ongu-1 esikrinini bese ucindezela inkinobho yokunyusa noma yokwehlisa ivolumu.
Izinga lokukhuluma leTalkBack: Swayipha uye phezulu noma ezansi ngeminwe emi-3. Uma uzwa "izinga lenkulumo", swayiphela phezulu noma phansi ngomunwe o-1.
Sebenzisa ukhiye wokusesha izwi ukuze uphrinte isihlahla se-node esikhundleni sokusesha
Nika amandla imbondela yelogu lokususa iphutha
Thinta uphinde ubambe ukubambezela lapho uthayipha
Ukubambezeleka kokuthayipha okufushane kusho ukuthi izaziso zeTalkBack zenziwe ngokushesha ngemva kokuthinta ikhibhodi.\n\nKhetha ukubambezeleka

Ilawula ukuthi iTalkBack ikhuluma ngokushesha kangakanani ngemva kokunyakaza kokugxilisa. Ukubambezeleka okufushane kwenza iTalkBack ibonakale ishesha, kodwa kungenza kube nzima kakhulu ukuthepha kabili nakathathu.\n\n Ukubambezeleka okungaphansi kwemizuzwana engu-0.3 kuzoshintsha ukuthepha kabili ukuze kusebenze ukuthepha ngeminwe emibili.
Vala i-TalkBack off bese uphinde uyivule ukuze usebenzise isethingi.

Thola izincazelo zesithombe se-AI eziningiliziwe uma ukhetha okuthi \“Chaza isithombe\” kumenyu yeTalkBack.\n\nUngathola nezincazelo ezizenzakalelayo uma ugxila esithombeni noma isithonjana. Izincazelo ezizenzakalelayo zisebenza ngaphandle koxhumano lwe-inthanethi.
Ungazama futhi ngemva kokuvula izincazelo zesithombe ezizenzekelayo noma ezinemininingwane
Yizwa izincazelo ezinde uma ukhetha okuthi \"%1$s\" kumenyu ye-TalkBack`
Uma usebenzisa lesi sakhi, izithombe ezikhethiwe zizothunyelwa kuGoogle ukuze zicutshungulwe bese ziyasulwa.\n\nI-AI Ekhiqizayo iyahlolwa, ngakho izowenza amaphutha. Ngokuqhubeka, uvumelana ne-%1$s.

Uzozwa incazelo emfushane uma ugxila esithombeni kuma-app asekelwayo.

Izithombe zicutshungulwa kudivayisi yakho futhi azithunyelwa kuGoogle. 

I-AI Ekhiqizayo iyahlolwa, ngakho izowenza amaphutha. Uma uqhubeka, wamukela Imigomo Yesevisi yeGoogle.
Izithombe zicutshungulwa kudivayisi yakho futhi azilokothi zithunyelwe kuGoogle.\n\nI-AI Ekhiqizayo iyahlolwa, ngakho izowenza amaphutha. Ngokuqhubeka, uvumelana ne-%1$s.
Idawuniloda imodeli ye-AI. Lokhu kungathatha isikhathi. Uzokwaziswa uma isiqedile.
Imodeli ye-AI idawunilodiwe. ITalkBack manje ingakwazi ukukhiqiza izincazelo zesithombe.

Izincazelo eziningiliziwe zomfanekiso zinikwa amandla yi-AI ekhiqizayo. Uma usebenzisa lesi sakhi, izithombe ezikhethiwe zizothunyelwa kuGoogle ukuze zicutshungulwe bese ziyasulwa.

I-AI Ekhiqizayo iyahlolwa, ngakho izowenza amaphutha. Ungavala izincazelo eziningiliziwe zesithombe noma nini kumasethingi eTalkBack.

Ngokuqhubeka, uvumelana ne-%1$s.

Uma usebenzisa lesi sakhi, isithombe-sikrini sesikrini sakho sizothunyelwa kuGoogle ukuze sicutshungulwe bese siyasuswa. Ukucubungula kuthatha imizuzwana embalwa.\n\nI-AI Ekhiqizayo iyahlolwa, ngakho izokwenza amaphutha. Ngokuqhubeka, uvumelana ne-%1$s.

Uzozwa incazelo emfushane uma ugxila esithombeni kuma-app asekelwayo.

Izithombe zicutshungulwa kudivayisi yakho futhi azithunyelwa kuGoogle.

I-AI Ekhiqizayo iyahlolwa, ngakho izowenza amaphutha. Uma uqhubeka, wamukela %1$s.
Ukuze ushintshe lokhu, %1$s ukuvula imenyu ye-TalkBack, khetha i-\"%2$s\", bese uthepha kabili.
Okukhethwayo kwemenyu okwengeziwe kuyatholakala ngemva kokusetha noma ukuvula idivayisi yakho

Imenyu ye-TalkBack. Swayiphela kwesokudla ukuze uhlole okungakhethwa kukho kumenyu ye-TalkBack.\n\nUkuze ubuyele emuva kokokufundisa, sebenzisa iminwe engu-2 ukuze uswayiphele kwesobunxele noma kwesokudla ukusuka ekugcineni kwesikrini sakho.

Hambisa isilawuli esifundayo phezulu noma emuva

Faka umbhalo ozosetshenziswa njengelebula yale nto\nIgama lokubuka langaphakathi: %1$s
Khetha ukuthi uyafuna yini ukukhipha noma weqe amalebula akhona uma kuba khona ukushayisana
Akukho okuzothunyelwa. Awungezanga noma yimaphi amalebula
{count,plural, =0{Awekho amalebula amasha}=1{Ilebula engu-# ibuyekeziwe}one{Amalebula angu-# abuyekeziwe}other{Amalebula angu-# abuyekeziwe}}
Azikho izinhlelo zokusebenza ezitholiwe ukuze kuhanjiswe amalebula
Azikho izinhlelo zokusebenza ezitholelwe ukuthumela amalebula.
Khetha uhlelo lokusebenza ozongenisa ngalo amalebula:
Khetha uhlelo lokusebenza ukuze uhlole amalebuli:

Le nguqulo ye-TalkBack ifaka phakathi izinguqulo ekuthinteni okufinyelelekayo kokuzenzakalela. Izenzo eziphathelene nalokho kuthinta kungenzeka ngendlela ofisa ngayo ngaphakathi kwezilungiselo ze-TalkBack. Uma Ukuhlola ngokuthinta kunikwe amandla, ungasebenzisa ukuthinta okulandelayo ukwenza izenzo ezithile.\n\n%1$s
Lokhu kuvala isibonisi ukuthuthukisa ubumfihlo. Okunye okuqukethwe kungenzeka kuboniswe, njengemiyalezo yokuvula isibonisi, noma amamenyu ezakhi zokufinyelela njengeTalkBack.

Le nguqulo ye-TalkBack ifaka phakathi izinguquko zezimpawu zokufinyeleleka okuzenzakalelayo.

Uphawu lokuya phezulu naphansi luzokuvumela ukuba uye kwinto yokuqala ekuskrini, bese uphawu oluya phansi naphezulu luzoya kwinto yokugcina.

Manje imbudumbudu yokufunda isingashintshwa ngokugxila entweni, bese ukhetha imbudumbudu kusuka kwimenyu yokuqukethwe ye-talkback.

Ungaguqula izenzo ezenziwe yilezi zimpawu kuzilungiselelo ze-TalkBack.
Ukuze umise isikhashana futhi udlale imidiya, manje ungakwazi ukuthepha kabili futhi ubambe ngeminwe emibili.\n\nOkunye ukuthinta nako zishintshile.

Le nguqulo ye-TalkBack ifaka ushintsho lokuthinta oluzenzakalelayo lokufinyelela.\n\nUkuthinta okuya phezulu manje kuambisa isethingi sangaphambilini sokuzulazula, futhi ukuthinta kwaphansi kuhambisa isethingi sokuzulazula okulandelayo.
Lezi zilungiselelo zisusiwe kusukela ku-TalkBack, ngenxa yezinkinga zokuthembeka:\n• Thepha kuhlangothi lokuthinta kwedivayisi\n• Khuhluza ukuze uqale ukufunda okuqhubekayo
Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvala Ukuhlola ngokuthinta?\n\nIdivayisi yakho ngeke isakwazi ukuphendula kusinqamuleli sokuthinta noma ukhulume izinto uma uthinta isikrini.
Nika amandla ukulungisa amaphutha kwenodi yesihlahla?

Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvula ukulungisa amaphutha wenodi yesihlahla?\n\nUkulungisa amaphutha wenodi yesihlahla kuveza okuqukethwe kwesikrini sakho kumalogi wedivayisi yakho, okungafundwa ezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza.
Nikeza kabusha ukuthepha kathathu ngeminwe engu-4?

Ukuqinisekisa lokhu kuzonikeza ukuthepha okuthathu ngeminwe engu-4 ukuze uphrinte isihlahla senodi.

Uma ukhansela, ukulungisa iphutha lenodi yesihlahla kuzonikwa amandla kodwa ukunyakaza ngeke kunikezwe, futhi uzodinga ukusetha lokhu kumasethingi okuthinta.

Ekukhubazeni ukulungisa iphutha lenodi yesihlahla, isenzo sangaphambilini sokuthinta, uma sikhona, ngeke sibuyiselwe.
Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuvula izibalo zokusebenza?\n\nIzibalo zokusebenza zingadla imemori namandla amaningi.

Landela le miyalelo: **Imiyalelo:** * Qala impendulo yakho ngempendulo ewumusho owodwa ophendula umbuzo * Ngemva kwalokho, ungenaba uchaze imininingwane eyengeziwe uma izoba usizo * Nikeza imibono kuphela uma inhloso yomsebenzisi iwukuthola umbono. Uma kungenjalo namathela emaqinisweni * Uma umsebenzisi ubuza ngendawo yento ethile esikrinini, chaza ukuthi ikuphi esikrinini (isibonelo, \"kubha yethebhu eduze kwendawo ephezulu kwesokudla\") ungayichazi ngokuyiqhathanisa nezinye izinto ezibonakala esikrinini. Cabanga ngokucophelela ukuze ugweme ukuphambanisa esokunxele nesokudla * Uma umsebenzisi ekucela ukuba uxhumane nesikrini (ngokwesibonelo, ukuthepha, ukuskrola, ukuthepha, ukusesha), kumelwe uphendule ngokuthi \"Ngiyaxolisa, ngikwazi ukuphendula kuphela imibuzo emayelana nesikrini okwamanje\" * Uma umsebenzisi ebuza ngemininingwane engaveli kusithombe-skrini, cacisa ukuthi imininingwane ayivezwa esikrinini bese uphendula umbuzo usebenzisa ulwazi lwakho oluvamile * Ungayisebenzisi noma iyiphi i-markdown empendulweni yakho. **Umlando Wengxoxo:**

Umsebenzi wakho ukusiza othile ongakwazi ukubona ifoni yakhe ukuba aqonde ukuthi yini esesikrinini sefoni yakho. Chaza le screenshot ngemisho emibalwa.
Imiyalelo Qala impendulo yakho \"Ngokubonakala esikrinini\" Ekuqaleni kwempendulo kufanele kuchazwe into ebaluleke kakhulu, ikhontenti eqapheleka kakhulu esikrinini. Nazi ezinye zezibonelo zezinto ezibaluleke kakhulu, ikhontenti eqapheleka kakhulu ozoyichaza ingase * Ibe ku-app yokuxoxa: umuntu othumele umyalezo nomyalezo wokugcina othunyelwe * Ibe ku-app yezinkundla zokuxhumana: iphosti yokuqala eyathunyelwa, okuhlanganisa umuntu owayithumela, umbhalo, nencazelo yesithombe * Ibe ku-app yezindaba: isihloko sendaba nencazelo yesithombe esiyinhloko * Ibe ku-app yokuthenga: incazelo yomkhiqizo obonisiwe nenani lawo * Ibe ku-app yekhalenda: umcimbi olandelayo nenani leminye imicimbi kuboniswe kamuva * Ibe sohlwini lwemiyalezo: igama nokubuyekezwa komyalezo wokuqala bese kuba amagama kuphela emiyalezo emibalwa elandelayo ohlwini, nokuthi mingaki imiyalezo engakafundwa
Ngemva kwalokho, impendulo ingachaza indawo eqondile nenjongo yebha yokufuna nezinkinobho ezimqoka. Ungayigaguli ikhontenti yebha yesimo maphezulu (isb. isikhathi, isimo senethiwekhi, ibhethri). Ungawasebenzisi ama-markdown empendulweni yakho.
Izincazelo zesithombe azitholakali uma isikrini sifihliwe. Bonisa isikrini sakho bese uyazama futhi.
U-%1$d MB usebenzisa idatha yeselula. Amanani edatha angase asebenze.
Uzozwa incazelo emfushane lapho ugxila esithonjaneni, njengenkinobho ku-app.\n\nIzithombe zicubungulwa edivayisini yakho futhi azilokothi zithunyelwe kuGoogle.
Uzozwa incazelo emfushane uma ugxila esithombeni kuma-app asekelwayo
Ukudawuniloda kuyadingeka ezincazelweni ezizenzekelayo zomfanekiso nesithonjana
Uzozwa incazelo emfushane uma ugxile emfanekisweni noma esithonjaneni kuma-app asekelwayo
Ayikwazi ukudawuniloda. Zama futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
Manje uzozwa izincazelo ezizenzekelayo zesithombe nezithonjana ngeTalkBack
Isitoreji sigcwele. Ukuze udawunilode, khulula u-%1$d MB kokuthi Amasethingi > Isitoreji.
Ayikwazi ukudawuniloda. Hlola ukuxhumeka kwakho uphinde uzame futhi.
Yizwa izincazelo uma ugxila esithombeni. Amanye ama-app angase angakusekeli lokhu.
Yizwa izincazelo uma ugxile kumfanekiso oqukethe umbhalo
Usengathola izincazelo zomfanekiso okhethiwe kumenyu ye-TalkBack
Ukuze uthole izincazelo futhi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, ungadawuniloda lesi sakhi Kumasethingi e-TalkBack
Lokhu kusula izincazelo ezizenzekelayo zazo zombili izithonjana nezithombe.\n\nUkuze uthole izincazelo futhi kamuva, ungadawuniloda lezi zakhi kumasethingi eTalkBack.
Vula ukunika amandla ukuqonda isikrini nge-Gemini
Ukuze uzwe izincazelo zesithombe, thola uhlobo lwakamuva lwe-%1$s kuGoogle Play.\n\nUma ukudawuniloda kuqedile, buyela kumasethingi eTalkBack futhi uvule izincazelo zesithombe ezizenzekelayo futhi.
Akukho ukuxhumana kwe-inthanethi. Hlola i-Wi-Fi yakho noma inethiwekhi yeselula bese uyazama futhi.
%1$s. Ayikwazi ukuthola incazelo yesithombe enemininingwane eminingi.
%1$s. Xhuma ku-inthanethi ukuze uthole incazelo yesithombe enemininingwane eminingi.
Nazi izenzo ezinkulu ongazithatha kulesi sikrini se-app:
Shintshela ngokuzenzekela esilawulini esifundayo sokufuna kwethebula lapho ufaka itafula
Ukuze uthole izinguquko ezifana nokugqamile, i-ithalikhi, ukudwebela nokuningi
Vula noma uvale ukufometha kokusho umbhalo
Shintsha ukuthi ukufometha, njengokugqamile noma okumalukeke, kufundwa phezulu yini
Uma inkulumo ivuliwe, uzozwa izimemezelo ezinjengokuthi \"qala ngokugqamile, isihlokwana, qeda okugqamile\"
Ivula noma ivale ngokuzenzakalelayo imodi yokubhrawuza ngokusekelwe entweni okuyo. Lokhu kuvumelanisa ukugxila kokungenayo okunokugxila kweTalkBack.
Ukuze uzwe izaziso uma isikrini sakho sivaliwe, vula okuthi \"Khuluma izaziso uma isikrini sivaliwe\" kumasethingi e-verbosity yeTalkBack
